prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock AJ-V8 (AM1) 5.9L V8 with a forged internals build featuring Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Cosworth, paired with a custom dry-sump oil system by Dailey Engineering to handle 8,500 RPM redline and 650+ HP on E85 fuel.

Forced Induction: Twin Garrett GT35R turbochargers (82mm compressor, 62mm turbine) with custom Tial MV-R 44mm wastegates and a front-mount air-to-water intercooler setup by PWR, feeding a custom 3.5" stainless steel intake manifold with port-matched throttle bodies from Jenvey Dynamics.

Drivetrain & Handling: Quaife ATB differential with 3.73:1 final drive ratio, paired with a Tilton twin-disc carbon clutch and a Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission. Suspension overhaul includes Öhlins TTX46 coilovers with 24-way adjustable damping, Eibach ERS race springs (400 lb/in front, 500 lb/in rear), and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro for subframe and control arms.
estetica: Bodywork: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using the DB7-specific Rocket Bunny V1 kit, featuring extended fenders (30mm front, 40mm rear), a custom front splitter with integrated canards, and a ducktail spoiler with adjustable Gurney flap. Carbon fiber hood with functional heat extractors and a custom mesh grille insert for improved airflow.

Aero & Wheels: 19x10" (front) and 19x12" (rear) BBS LM-R wheels with custom offsets (+15mm front, +25mm rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/19 front, 325/30/19 rear). Custom 3D-printed titanium wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) for perfect fitment. Front bumper canards and rear diffuser from APR Performance, paired with a custom underbody diffuser from Aerosport.

Interior & Details: Full Alcantara retrim by Royal Steering Wheels, including dashboard, door cards, and Recaro Pole Position seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses. Custom titanium roll cage by Safety Devices, integrated with a Motec C127 dash display and a bespoke switch panel for turbo boost, launch control, and traction settings. Engine bay dress-up includes a carbon fiber intake manifold cover, titanium bolt kit from ARP, and a custom anodized aluminum oil catch can system by Radium Engineering.
